mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_background WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_background WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_current = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_background SET is_current = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_background SET is_current = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
